content: Composer 2.5 is now available in Cursor. It's a substantial improvement in intelligence and behavior over Composer 2. It is better at sustained work on long-running tasks, follows complex instructions more reliably, and is more pleasant to collaborate with. • **Standard:** \$0.50/M input, \$2.50/M output tokens • **Fast** (default): \$3.00/M input, \$15.00/M output tokens Composer 2.5 includes double usage for the first week. See our model docs for full details. Read more in our announcement.
